name: Layla Al-Shammari
whatsapp_message: السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته يا ليلى 👋 لاحظنا أنك واجهتِ بعض الصعوبات في الاختبار الأخير، وأنا هنا لمساعدتك! عندك 6 أيام قبل الاختبار القادم - هل تستطيعين أن نلتقي غداً لنراجع المواضيع الصعبة معاً؟ 💪
action: Schedule an urgent one-on-one review session with Layla today to cover the quiz content before the next assessment in 6 days, and confirm her attendance via WhatsApp.
reasoning: Layla is at critical risk with a 78/100 flag score and a failing quiz (35/100) despite perfect attendance, indicating motivation but knowledge gaps. With only 6 days until the next quiz and 11 days without contact, immediate targeted intervention is essential to prevent further failure and keep her engaged in the remedial track.
